data.name: token
data.notes: Admin JWT — paste accessToken from Admin Auth > Verify OTP response

data.name: dealerPhone
data.notes: Must be E.164 format: + country code + number, e.g. +919876543210

data.name: dealerToken
data.notes: Dealer JWT — paste accessToken from Dealer Auth > Verify OTP response

data.name: customerToken
data.notes: Customer JWT — paste accessToken from /auth/verify-otp (for a CUSTOMER or new phone)

data.name: appId
data.notes: Verification app UUID — paste after creating an app, also used as X-App-Id for dealer mobile calls

data.name: templateId
data.notes: Product template UUID — required when creating a verification app

data.name: webhookId
data.notes: Webhook UUID — paste after registering a webhook
